expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: Google Sheets dashboard export coverage distinguishes supported formats, entry points, and output expectations
expectations.evidence: The output defines the intended focus and lists what would be needed, but does not show actual Phase 5b QA plan/checkpoint content that explicitly covers supported formats/entry points/output expectations. It states: "No Phase 5b run artifacts were provided... cannot verify... that the QA plan content explicitly distinguishes supported formats / entry points / output expectations" and concludes coverage is "NOT demonstrably satisfied."

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase5b
expectations.evidence: The produced result is explicitly framed as Phase 5b checkpoint enforcement and evaluates Phase 5b contract artifacts/disposition rules (checkpoint_audit, checkpoint_delta, qa_plan_phase5b), e.g., "# ... Phase 5b Checkpoint Enforcement" and "What Phase 5b requires (contract)... must produce: context/checkpoint_audit..., context/checkpoint_delta..., drafts/qa_plan_phase5b...".
